commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Linux CSQLite3/SQLite packaging, enables OpenCode Go local SQLite usage and Command Code manual-cookie billing on Linux, carries Command Code CLI settings into snapshots, and updates docs, tests, and release workflow coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main's non-macOS CLI gate blocks these auto/web provider paths before fetch, Command Code is unavailable outside macOS even with manual-cookie settings, and OpenCode Go local SQLite is macOS-only on current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Owner-authored PR with compatibility and auth-provider contract changes needs maintainer acceptance and completed required checks rather than an automated repair.

target.title: Fix Linux OpenCode Go and Command Code usage
target.body:
## Summary
- enable OpenCode Go local SQLite usage on Linux through a system SQLite module
- allow Command Code billing on Linux when a manual cookie is configured
- carry Command Code cookie settings into CLI snapshots and document Linux source behavior
- stage the checksum-pinned SQLite header and archive together for static musl release builds without host `pkg-config` paths
- add Linux SQLite, source-gating, settings, and strategy regressions

Fixes #1657.

## Proof
Exact head: `a49db6fa94818f3f47e9df3518b26d06f25c6eed`

- `swift test --filter '(CLIEntryTests|CommandCodeProviderTests|TokenAccountEnvironmentPrecedenceTests|OpenCodeGoLinuxTests)'` (38 passed on exact rebased head)
- `swift test --filter 'CLIEntryTests|TokenAccountEnvironmentPrecedenceTests|CommandCodeProviderTests|OpenCodeGoProviderStrategyTests|OpenCodeGoLinuxTests'` (62 passed on the prior source-identical head)
- `swift test --filter CommandCodeUsageFetcherTests` (20 passed on prior code-identical provider head)
- `make check` passed; SwiftFormat clean and SwiftLint reported zero violations
- `make test` passed all 41 groups / 490 selections on the prior source-identical head
- Release CLI workflow YAML parses locally
- exact current-main whole-branch autoreview clean (0.86); prior source-identical full-branch autoreview clean (0.82)
- Crabbox Linux / Swift 6.2.1 release build on code-identical pre-rebase head `89522516`: OpenCode Go read a real SQLite fixture and returned `source: local`; Command Code with a configured invalid cookie reached the live API and returned invalid-session rather than macOS/browser gating
- prior manual Release CLI run `27840022407`: regular Linux x64/arm64 passed; musl x64/arm64 exposed host `pkg-config` library-path contamination and failed before this repair
- exact manual Release CLI run `27840826263`: glibc x64/arm64 and musl x64/arm64 all passed build, smoke, package, and artifact steps; redundant queued macOS matrix jobs were canceled afterward to free runners

The musl build installs `sqlite3.h` from the same checksum-verified amalgamation directory used to compile `sqlite3.c` and archive `libsqlite3.a`. `CSQLite3` relies on its module map for linkage instead of consulting host `pkg-config`, preventing glibc library paths from contaminating cross-musl links.
target.author: steipete
